languages.text:
Thanks to its Servoskull Swarm, the Overseer has +{uip|LoreImperium|c2b1ef432de5499f8190352794357341}% Dodge and Armor.
This bonus is removed after the first combat encounter.

Thanks to its Servoskull Swarm, the Overseer has +{uip|LoreImperium|c2b1ef432de5499f8190352794357341}% Dodge and Armor.

languages.text: During the next combat, the servo-skull swarm will increase its Overseer's dodge and armour by +{uip|LoreImperium|c2b1ef432de5499f8190352794357341}%.
